nasb.text: At one moment I might speak concerning a nation or concerning a kingdom to uproot, to pull down, or to destroy it;

esv.text: If at any time I declare concerning a nation or a kingdom, that I will pluck up and break down and destroy it,

cnv.text: 我甚麼時候宣布要拔出、拆毀、毀滅一邦或一國，

ccb.text: 当我宣布要铲除、推翻、毁灭哪一邦或哪一国的时候，
